name: Tier 3 assistant confirm cancels event on dashboard
description: User creates an event, asks the assistant to cancel it via Command Bar, confirms the amber banner, and the event disappears from the weekly calendar

planSteps.description: Type a unique email using tier3-asst- plus random digits then @timeora.app into the email field
Type TimeoraE2E123! into the password field
If login fails because account does not exist, navigate to the register page, create the same account, then return to login and sign in
Wait for 5 seconds for the dashboard weekly calendar to load
Click an empty time slot on the weekly calendar to open the new event dialog
Type Tier3 Assistant Cancel Event into the event title field
Click the Save button in the event dialog
Wait for 3 seconds for the event to appear on the calendar
Press Ctrl+K or Cmd+K to open the Command Bar
Type cancel Tier3 Assistant Cancel Event into the Command Bar input
Press Enter to submit the assistant command
Wait for 3 seconds for the assistant confirmation banner to appear on the dashboard
Click the Confirm button in the amber assistant confirmation banner above the calendar
Wait for 3 seconds for the calendar to refresh
Verify the weekly calendar no longer shows Tier3 Assistant Cancel Event after confirming the assistant cancel
